title: ATTICUS_MPO retrieval-quality follow-up after context-cell merge
content: After PR #99, the next memory-engine follow-up is retrieval quality rather than basic persistence. The current merged ranking now uses scope and tag richness with recency fallback, but it does not yet consume explicit query, session-task, or packet-level relevance hints. The next sprint should add stronger query-aware or task-aware ranking while preserving bounded injection and backward compatibility.
context_summary: Durable follow-up cell for the next MPO memory-engine sprint. Captures the remaining gap after the merged context-cell upgrade: retrieval quality and stronger relevance ranking.
